name: Genuine Logo Design Enquiry
description: A legitimate client approaches a designer on Fiverr with a clear, reasonable brief, pays through the platform, and communicates professionally throughout. This is the control case — the system must NOT flag this conversation.

conversation.speaker: client
conversation.message: Hi! I saw your portfolio and really liked the minimal branding work you did for the coffee shop. I'm looking for a logo for my new bakery — something warm and hand-crafted looking. Budget is $150, timeline is 5 business days. Does that work for you?

conversation.speaker: freelancer
conversation.message: Thanks for reaching out! That sounds like a fun project. Do you have any color preferences or existing brand assets I should be aware of?

conversation.speaker: client
conversation.message: We're thinking warm browns and creams. No existing assets yet — this is a fresh start. I'll place the order through Fiverr and share a full brief in the requirements form.

conversation.speaker: freelancer
conversation.message: Perfect. I'll review the brief once the order is placed and reach out if I have any questions before starting. Looking forward to working with you!

conversation.speaker: client
conversation.message: Order placed! Let me know if you need anything else. Happy to jump on a quick call if it helps.

notes: Control case — no scam signals present. System must return CLEAR and not raise any alert. A false positive here would undermine user trust in the tool.
